transcript.content: Charlie Charlie Bit Me ouch OU ouch Jolie OU Johnny that really hurts bit me and that really hurt Char it's still act hurting

metadata.title: Charlie bit my finger - again !
metadata.description:
Contact us at harryandcharlie@gmail.com
I am sorry comments are turned off.  YouTube have set the video to 'made for kids'.  I have appealed many times and every time I get an anonymous rejection from the community.  I have tried to enable your engagements but no one from YouTube will return contact.  This video was made for my friends and family and engagement has always been with adults.  Instead I have moved to engaging with Fans through NFT.  We helped YouTube grow and embraced it early.  We are now moving onto the next exciting thing.

Charlie bit my finger - again ! Subscribe here: http://bit.ly/1oHVuUM

Even had I thought of trying to get my boys to do this I probably couldn't have. Neither were coerced into any of this and neither were hurt (for very long anyway).  This was just one of those moments when I had the video camera out because the boys were being fun and they provided something really very funny.

T-Shirts
iPhone  http://itunes.apple.com/gb/app/charlie-bit-me!!!/id494858348?mt=8
Android  https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.viralspiral.charlie 

FAQ Harry is 8 3/4, Charlie is 6 1/2, Jasper is  4 1/4, Rupert is 1 1/2
(November 2012)



Twitter
http://twitter.com/harryandcharlie
